title: Faithful Fusion Connected Clean Glass 32x Add-on
description: Makes Faithful 32x clean glass textures connected for non-Optifine users.
body:
Addons for the Faithful 32x texture pack. Makes glass blocks and glass panes connect beautifully.\
Put it on top of the [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) texture pack so it works properly.

## **Example This Clean Type Glass Addon:**
![Before and After Comparison.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d31fde75a4bf332275c6723ae570b4f5bdd78e05.png)

<details>
<summary>If you need these Addons, with different types you can download them here:</summary>

Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Clean Glass 32x. (This addon)\
Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Default Glass 32x. ([Visit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-fusion-connected-default-glass-32x-add-on))\
Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Clean Glass 64x. ([Visit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-fusion-connected-clean-glass-64x-add-on))\
Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Default Glass 64x. ([Visit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-fusion-connected-default-glass-64x-add-on))

</details>

## **REQUIRES:**

This texture pack addon also requires [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) by [SuperMartin642](https://modrinth.com/user/SuperMartijn642) to work.

## Note:

This add-ons is not compatible with [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), as Faithful already has Optifine add-ons built-in. If you want to use these addons with Continuity, you can get support by joining our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/54jf2kuwVb).\
So, if you're using Optifine, you don't need this. Faithful 32x already has it (Default type).
